steps.title: Focus on the finding
steps.content: The text first notes a common owner belief that breeds have predictable personality traits. Grant and colleagues then found that behavior varies widely among dogs of the same breed, even though physical traits are predictably inherited.

steps.title: Remove secondary details
steps.content: A is background about how breeds exist. C introduces popularity changes that the text never mentions. D focuses on the study methods rather than the conclusion about behavior. The answer is B.
